title: Emjan PVP : Clean Edition
description: The ultimate clean PvP experience with custom tools, Nuit sky support, and optimized HUD elements.
body:
> EMJAN PVP : CLEAN EDITION
### EMJAN PvP is a performance-driven pack built for competitive combat. It strips away visual clutter to keep your focus where it matters: the fight.
✨ Key Features

- ⚔️ Combat Optimization: Features Short Swords and custom-modeled tools for a cleaner field of view.

- 🌌 Nuit Sky Support: A stunning, deep custom sky designed to work perfectly with the Nuit mod.

- 🎨 Custom HUD & Visuals: Includes a modernized UI with custom Heart & Hunger bars, plus integrated Low Fire to keep your screen clear during combat.

🚀 Why Choose EMJAN PvP?
This pack isn't just a visual upgrade; it’s a competitive advantage. We prioritized clarity over complex textures to ensure high FPS and maximum focus in every duel.

 🛠️ Installation & Recommendations
Mod Support: For the best visual experience, make sure to install the Nuit mod to enable the custom sky.

**_Optimization: Highly recommended to use with Fabric + Sodium for peak performance._**



!!**~~THIS PACK IS MADE BY LOTUS _**DONT COPY WITHOUT PERMISSION**_~~**!!
